breaking.title: Ukrainian drone attacks on oil refineries plunge Russia into a summer fuel crisis
breaking.summary: Ukrainian officials describe the strikes as a campaign to pressure Moscow to end the war by undermining its military logistics and supply lines and weakening its ability to mount assaults along the front

breaking.title: WHO sounds alarm on disease outbreaks in quake-hit Venezuela
breaking.summary: By the latest official count, some 1,700 are dead and 5,000 are injured, with no governmental word on the number of missing. Other estimates place these in the tens of thousands

breaking.title: Three killed as retaining wall collapses on building at Naguri in Mangaluru
breaking.summary: Rescue workers, including NDRF personnel, rescued a male and two girls who were trapped under the debris, police said

breaking.title: In the Strait of Hormuz, Iran draws its red lines
breaking.summary: The strait, a critical energy and economic chokepoint connecting the Persian Gulf with the Arabian Sea through the Gulf of Oman, was open to international shipping before the war

breaking.title: Rupee hits near three-week low at 95.24 vs USD as Asian currencies drop on Fed, Iran war caution
breaking.summary: The Indian rupee hit a near three-week low on Wednesday, mirroring declines in Asian currencies. Investors grew cautious ahead of U.S. Federal Reserve Chair's remarks and uncertainty surrounding U.S.-Iran negotiations. Despite falling oil prices and measures to boost dollar inflows, analysts anticipate no significant rupee recovery in the coming year due to central bank liabilities and subdued foreign portfolio inflows.

breaking.title: Telangana’s OGH doctors perform 36-hour surgery to transplant five organs on one patient
breaking.summary: All organs for the transplant were donated by a woman who was declared brain dead. The multi-visceral transplant is claimed as India’s first.

breaking.title: The legend of California's terrifying Char-Man: How a wildfire gave birth to one of America's haunting legends
European markets ride oil tailwinds, but can they challenge Wall Street’s tech supremacy?
breaking.summary: European equities are rallying as lower crude prices following the Iran ceasefire improve the region’s near-term outlook, easing inflation and boosting corporate margins. While the STOXX 600 has hit record highs, investors remain unconvinced that the gains will trigger a lasting shift away from Wall Street, where AI-driven earnings growth continues to underpin stronger market performance.
